description_long: This is a wooden ladder with five evenly spaced horizontal rungs, supported by two sturdy side rails. The wood grain is visible throughout, giving it a classic, natural appearance suitable for both indoor and outdoor urban environments. The side rails are rectangular in profile and appear robust, with a slightly wider base for stability. The ladder does not feature any visible safety enhancements such as anti-slip feet or handrails. Its construction suggests it is designed to be leaned against a surface for access to elevated areas. The finish is matte, highlighting the natural wood texture and color.
description: A classic wooden ladder with five rungs and rectangular side rails, finished in a natural brown matte wood grain.
description_view_0: Side profile showing the narrow edge of the ladder and the thickness of the side rails.
description_view_1: Frontal view displaying all five horizontal rungs and the full width of the ladder.
description_view_2: Opposite side profile, identical to view 0, showing the narrow edge and side rail thickness.
description_view_3: Rear view, similar to the front, showing all five rungs and the ladder's width.
